name: Stir-Fried Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pot of boiling water, add the flat rice stick noodles and cook for about 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent them from sticking together.
2. Remove from heat and drain in a colander. Rinse with cold water. Set aside.
3. Heat the oil in a large wok and stir-fry the garlic and onion until golden brown.
4. Add the pork, shrimp (with soaking water), and chilies. Stir-fry for 5 minutes.
5. Add sugar, fish sauce, salt, lime juice, ketchup, and black pepper. Mix well.
6. Add the cooked noodles and bean sprouts. Stir again for 2 minutes.
7. Transfer to a large serving platter and garnish with green onion, fresh coriander, and peanuts.
(Serves 6-8)
